en: Now these are the last words of David: The oracle of David, the son of Jesse, the oracle of the man who was raised on high, the anointed of the God of Jacob, the sweet psalmist of Israel:
zh: 以下是大衛末了的話： “耶西的兒子大衛的宣告， 被高舉的人的宣告。 大衛是雅各的 神所膏立的， 是以色列美妙的詩人。

en: "The Spirit of the LORD speaks by me; his word is on my tongue.
zh: 耶和華的靈藉著我說話， 他的話在我的舌頭上。

en: The God of Israel has spoken; the Rock of Israel has said to me: When one rules justly over men, ruling in the fear of God,
zh: 以色列的 神說， 以色列的磐石告訴我： 那以公義統治人的， 那存敬畏 神的心施行統治的，

en: he dawns on them like the morning light, like the sun shining forth on a cloudless morning, like rain that makes grass to sprout from the earth.
zh: 他必像旭日昇起的光芒， 像無雲的早晨， 像雨後的晴朗， 使地長出綠草。

en: For does not my house stand so with God? For he has made with me an everlasting covenant, ordered in all things and secure. For will he not cause to prosper all my help and my desire?
zh: 我的家在 神面前不是這樣嗎？ 他與我立了永遠的約； 這約安排了一切，穩固妥當。 我的一切救恩、一切願望， 他不都成全嗎？

en: But worthless men are all like thorns that are thrown away, for they cannot be taken with the hand;
zh: 流氓卻像荊棘被丟棄， 人不敢用手拿它。

en: but the man who touches them arms himself with iron and the shaft of a spear, and they are utterly consumed with fire."
zh: 人要碰它， 必須帶備鐵器和槍桿， 他們要在原地被火徹底燒毀。”

en: These are the names of the mighty men whom David had: Josheb-basshebeth a Tahchemonite; he was chief of the three. He wielded his spear against eight hundred whom he killed at one time.
zh: 以下是大衛勇士的名字：他革捫人約設．巴設，是軍官 的首領，又稱為伊斯尼人亞底挪。他曾在一次戰役中殺死了八百人。

en: And next to him among the three mighty men was Eleazar the son of Dodo, son of Ahohi. He was with David when they defied the Philistines who were gathered there for battle, and the men of Israel withdrew.
zh: 其次是亞合人朵多的兒子以利亞撒。從前非利士人在巴斯達閔聚集要爭戰，與大衛一同去向他們罵陣的三個勇士，其中之一就是以利亞撒；那時以色列人向上撤退，

en: He rose and struck down the Philistines until his hand was weary, and his hand clung to the sword. And the LORD brought about a great victory that day, and the men returned after him only to strip the slain.
zh: 他卻起來，擊殺非利士人，直到他的手疲乏無力，緊貼在刀把上。那一天耶和華使以色列人獲得了大勝利。眾人轉到以利亞撒後面，只顧剝奪死者的財物。

en: And next to him was Shammah, the son of Agee the Hararite. The Philistines gathered together at Lehi, where there was a plot of ground full of lentils, and the men fled from the Philistines.
zh: 再其次是哈拉人亞基的兒子沙瑪。非利士人聚集在利希，那裡有一塊田地長滿了紅豆，眾人都從非利士人面前逃走。

en: But he took his stand in the midst of the plot and defended it and struck down the Philistines, and the LORD worked a great victory.
zh: 沙瑪卻在那塊田中間站穩腳步，保護了那塊田，又擊殺了非利士人。耶和華又使以色列人獲得了大勝利。

en: And three of the thirty chief men went down and came about harvest time to David at the cave of Adullam, when a band of Philistines was encamped in the Valley of Rephaim.
zh: 收割的時候，三十個首領中有三個人下到亞杜蘭洞那裡去見大衛；有一隊非利士人在利乏音谷安營。

en: David was then in the stronghold, and the garrison of the Philistines was then at Bethlehem.
zh: 那時大衛在山寨中，非利士人的駐軍卻在伯利恆。

en: And David said longingly, "Oh, that someone would give me water to drink from the well of Bethlehem that is by the gate!"
zh: 大衛渴望說：“但願有人把伯利恆城門旁邊井裡的水拿來給我喝！”

en: Then the three mighty men broke through the camp of the Philistines and drew water out of the well of Bethlehem that was by the gate and carried and brought it to David. But he would not drink of it. He poured it out to the LORD
zh: 那三個勇士就闖過非利士人的營地，從伯利恆城門旁邊的井裡打水，把水取上來，帶到大衛那裡。大衛不肯喝，卻把水澆奠在耶和華面前。

en: and said, "Far be it from me, O LORD, that I should do this. Shall I drink the blood of the men who went at the risk of their lives?" Therefore he would not drink it. These things the three mighty men did.
zh: 大衛說：“耶和華啊！我絕對不可作這事。這三個人冒著生命危險去打水，這水不是他們的血嗎？”因此大衛不肯喝那水。這些是那三個勇士所作的事。

en: Now Abishai, the brother of Joab, the son of Zeruiah, was chief of the thirty. And he wielded his spear against three hundred men and killed them and won a name beside the three.
zh: 洗魯雅的兒子約押的兄弟亞比篩是三十勇士 的首領。他曾揮舞矛槍殺死了三百人，因此他與“三勇士”齊名。

en: He was the most renowned of the thirty and became their commander, but he did not attain to the three.
zh: 他的榮譽比那“三十勇士”高 ，所以成為他們的領袖；不過，卻不及“三勇士”。

en: And Benaiah the son of Jehoiada was a valiant man of Kabzeel, a doer of great deeds. He struck down two ariels of Moab. He also went down and struck down a lion in a pit on a day when snow had fallen.
zh: 甲薛人耶何耶大的兒子比拿雅，是一個力氣很大的人，作過許多大事。他曾經擊殺了摩押人的兩個勇將；又在下雪的時候，下到坑裡去擊殺了一隻獅子。

en: And he struck down an Egyptian, a handsome man. The Egyptian had a spear in his hand, but Benaiah went down to him with a staff and snatched the spear out of the Egyptian's hand and killed him with his own spear.
zh: 他還擊殺了一個體格高大的埃及人。這埃及人手裡有矛，比拿雅只拿著棍子下去與他對抗；結果他把埃及人手中的矛槍奪了過來，用那矛槍殺死他。

en: These things did Benaiah the son of Jehoiada, and won a name beside the three mighty men.
zh: 這些是耶何耶大的兒子比拿雅所作的事。他與“三勇士”齊名。

en: He was renowned among the thirty, but he did not attain to the three. And David set him over his bodyguard.
zh: 他的榮譽比那“三十勇士”高，不過，卻不及“三勇士”。大衛立他作侍衛長。

en: Asahel the brother of Joab was one of the thirty; Elhanan the son of Dodo of Bethlehem,
zh: 三十個勇士中有約押的兄弟亞撒黑、伯利恆人朵多的兒子伊勒哈難、

en: Shammah of Harod, Elika of Harod,
zh: 哈律人沙瑪、哈律人以利加、

en: Helez the Paltite, Ira the son of Ikkesh of Tekoa,
zh: 帕勒提人希利斯、提哥亞人益吉的兒子以拉、

en: Abiezer of Anathoth, Mebunnai the Hushathite,
zh: 亞拿突人亞比以謝、戶沙人米本乃、

en: Zalmon the Ahohite, Maharai of Netophah,
zh: 亞合人撒門、尼陀法人瑪哈萊、

en: Heleb the son of Baanah of Netophah, Ittai the son of Ribai of Gibeah of the people of Benjamin,
zh: 尼陀法人巴拿的兒子希立、便雅憫子孫基比亞人利拜的兒子以太、

en: Benaiah of Pirathon, Hiddai of the brooks of Gaash,
zh: 比拉頓人比拿雅、迦實溪人希太、

en: Abi-albon the Arbathite, Azmaveth of Bahurim,
zh: 伯．亞拉巴人亞比亞本、巴魯米人押斯瑪弗、

en: Eliahba the Shaalbonite, the sons of Jashen, Jonathan,
zh: 沙本人以利雅哈巴、雅善的兒子約拿單、

en: Shammah the Hararite, Ahiam the son of Sharar the Hararite,
zh: 哈拉人沙瑪、哈拉人沙拉的兒子亞希暗、

en: Eliphelet the son of Ahasbai of Maacah, Eliam the son of Ahithophel of Gilo,
zh: 瑪迦人亞哈拜的兒子以利法列、基羅人亞希多弗的兒子以連、

en: Hezro of Carmel, Paarai the Arbite,
zh: 迦密人希斯萊、亞巴人帕萊、

en: Igal the son of Nathan of Zobah, Bani the Gadite,
zh: 瑣巴人拿單的兒子以申、迦得人巴尼、

en: Zelek the Ammonite, Naharai of Beeroth, the armor-bearer of Joab the son of Zeruiah,
zh: 亞捫人洗勒、比錄人拿哈萊 、

en: Ira the Ithrite, Gareb the Ithrite,
zh: 以帖人以拉、以帖人迦立、

en: Uriah the Hittite: thirty-seven in all.
zh: 赫人烏利亞，共有三十七人。
